title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB5009UPr+S+IN
description: RB5009 is a brand new series of RouterBOARDs that comes with passive cooling , innovative to futuristic design and high performance (60 - 90 % higher than RB4011) which is due to the 64-bit ARM processor architecture with a 1400MHz clock, 1 GB of DDR4 RAM and 1 GB of NAND storage. The router has 7Ã Gigabit LAN, 1Ã 2.5Gbit LAN with PoE IN and PoE OUT (802.3af/at) on all eight Ethernet ports with with a total PoE budget of 130 W, DC jack or terminal box on the left side (24 .. 57V DC), 1Ã SFP+… Small, durable and powerful device with ARM 64bit architecture CPU 1400 MHz, 4 cores, 1GB RAM, 1GB NAND 3 types of power supply - DC jack, terminal block, PoE (24 to 57 V DC) PoE IN and PoE OUT on all eight Ethernet ports! Eth1 PoE IN - Mode A & B, Eth2-8 PoE IN - mode B PoE OUT Mode B Passive cooling without fans Interfaces: (7) Gigabit, (1) 2.5 Gigabit, (1) SFP/SFP+, (1) USB 3.0 RouterOS L5 version 7 pre-installed Possibility of installation in a 19" rack with optional accessories Device Power adapter 48 V/2 A + power cable Screws, dowels
